ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dscripka/openWakeWord
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dscripka/openWakeWord
Language: jupyter-notebook
An open-source audio wake word (or phrase) detection framework with a focus on performance and simplicity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: duoan/TorchCode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/duoan/TorchCode
Language: jupyter-notebook
🔥 LeetCode for PyTorch — practice implementing softmax, attention, GPT-2 and more from scratch with instant auto-grading. Jupyter-based, self-hosted or try online.

Language: jupyter-notebook

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/segment-anything
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/segment-anything
Language: jupyter-notebook
The repository provides code for running inference with the SegmentAnything Model (SAM), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: karpathy/micrograd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/karpathy/micrograd
Language: jupyter-notebook
A tiny scalar-valued autograd engine and a neural net library on top of it with PyTorch-like API
